briefdescription.para: Mailbox of the LTE connector.
Cyclic reconnect timer.

detaileddescription.para: The hardware device ID, which is the modem's IMEI

briefdescription.para: The MQTT host name.

detaileddescription.para: device/${device_id}/measurement/update Device publishes measurement data to platform.
device/${device_id}/metric/update Device publishes internal metric information to the platform.
device/${device_id}/pubkey Device publishes public TLS key to the platform.
Device commands /device/{device_id}/command
device/${device_id}/ota/update Device receives OTA update information from the platform.
Device Events /device/{device_id}/event
device/${device_id}/config/update Device receives configuration update information from the platform.
Flag indicating that connection to MQTT broker is established
Flag indicating that connection to LTE modem broker is established

briefdescription.para: ID of the last message published to MQTT broker.
Number of MQTT connect retries.
Metrics interval from config class.
MqttConnector task constructor.

detaileddescription.para:
name
The name of the class
The constructor allocate and register a mailbox and allocates and initialize the cyclic reconnect timer with duration of 60 ms and period of 300 ms. It read the IMEI of the modem by calling member function getDeviceId and complete the topic strings with the IMEI.

briefdescription.para: MqttConnector task destructor.

detaileddescription.para: The destructor is never called and is implemented only for completion reasons. It simply triggers a debug message on info debug level.

briefdescription.para: MqttConnector virtual task configure function.

detaileddescription.para: The configure function overloads the configure function of the task base class. It retrieves the configuration related to metrics by call of the function getCfgMetrics provided by the Config class, convert the timeout intervall in seconds and initialize member variabel metricsInterval with this value.

briefdescription.para: MQTT connector task function.

detaileddescription.para:
Initially the function register the callback functions for MQTT broker events by assigning them in structure cfg of type mqtt_helper_cfg and calling the function mqtt_helper_init provided by the nRF IoT library. Afterwards the function enters the endless loop and wait for messages. Task wakes up when a message is in the mailbox and read the message by calling mailbox read method which returns the pointer pElem to the message. All expected messages will be handled, in case of an unexpected message an error debug message will be triggered. Finally the message will be released by calling class PoolElem method free, if the pointer pElem is not explicitly set to 0.
Message Handling:
eTimerExpired: On timer expiry the function checks if a LTE connection is established and MQTT connection was lost. In this case the member function connect will be called to send a new connect request to the MQTT broker. Afterwards the pointer pElem will be set to 0, to prevent releasing the message because it is allocated static.
eCmdAccept: If MQTT broker is connected, a accepted response will be send to the MQTT broker by call of the private member function PublishAcceptedResponse.
eCmdReject: If MQTT broker is connected, a rejected response will be send to the MQTT broker by call of the private member function PublishRejectedResponse.
eOtaStart: If MQTT broker is connected, a accepted response will be send to the MQTT broker by call of the private member function PublishAcceptedResponse. Finally a subscribe request will be send to MQTT broker by calling the member function ota_subscribe.
eFwAccept: If MQTT broker is connected, a accepted response will be send to the MQTT broker by call of the private member function PublishAcceptedResponse.
eFwReject: If MQTT broker is connected, a rejected response will be send to the MQTT broker by call of the private member function PublishRejectedResponse.
eFwDlSuccess: If MQTT broker is connected, a accepted response will be send to the MQTT broker by call of the private member function PublishDlResult.
eFwDlFailed: If MQTT broker is connected, a rejected response will be send to the MQTT broker by call of the private member function PublishDlResult.
eMqttConnected: Message will be forwarded to power manager task, the pointer pElem will be set to 0, to prevent releasing the message. The flag connected will be set to true and the reconnect timer will be stopped by calling stop function of the timer class. Afterwards the function checks if public TLS key is already send to backend. In this case a debug message at warning level will be printed, otherwise the key transfer to backend will be iniatialized y sending message eKeyTransferReq to its own (MQTT connectors) mailbox.
eMqttDisconnected: The flag connected will be set to false, to prevent inconsistent library states the member function abort will be called and in cast LTE is connected the reconnect timer will be started by calling start function of the timer class.
eLteSleepEnter: Will be ignored, only debug message at info level will be printed.
eLteSleepExit: Will be ignored, only debug message at info level will be printed.
eKeyTransferReq: If MQTT broker is connected, the public key will be retrieved by call of function getPublicKey provided by class KeyGen and the key will be send to MQTT broken in pubkey topic by calling private member function PublishData. Finally by key transfered indicator will be set by call of function setKeyTransfered, also provided by class KeyGen
eMetrics: If MQTT broker is connected, the message payload will be copied to topic payload structure and send to MQTT broker in metrics topic by call of private member function PublishData
eMeasurements: If MQTT broker is connected, the message payload will be copied to topic payload structure and send to MQTT broker in measurement topic by call of private member function PublishData
eLteConnected: If LTE is not connected, the flag lte_connected will be set to true and if MQTT broker is not connected, the member function connect will be called to send a new connect request to the MQTT broker.
eLteDisconnected: The flag lte_connected will be set to false, the reconnect timer will be stopped by calling stop function of the timer class and the member function disconnect will be called to send a disconnect request to the MQTT broker.
eJsonConfig: Call of member function HandleNewConfiguration.
eFactoryDefault: Call of member function HandleFactoryDefault.
eColdStartReq: Call of member function HandleColdStartReq.
eBoostOnReq: Call of member function HandleBoostOnReq.
eBoostOffReq: Call of member function HandleBoostOffReq.
eFsErase: Call of member function HandleFsErase
eFsStatus: Call of member function HandleFsStatus
eDisableADXL: Call of member function HandleDisableADXL
eEnableADXL: Call of member function HandleEnableADXL
eGetConfig: Call of member function HandleGetConfig

briefdescription.para: Timer expired function for the reconnect timer.

detaileddescription.para: The function initializes the static pool element e1 with message type eTimerExpired, set LTE connector as sender and put message into own (LTE connector's) mailbox.

briefdescription.para: Function to send a connect request to the MQTT broker.

detaileddescription.para: The function copy host name and device ID in structure of type mqtt_helper_conn_params provided by nRF IoT library and send this structure with a connect request to the broker by calling function mqtt_helper_connect also provided by nRF IoT library. To prevent inconsistent library states the member function abort will be called in case of an error. Finally the reconnect timer will be started to schedule reconnection attempts.

briefdescription.para: Function to send a disconnect request to the MQTT broker.

detaileddescription.para: The function send a disconnect request to the broker by calling function mqtt_helper_disconnect provided by nRF IoT library.

briefdescription.para: Function to send a abort request to the MQTT broker.

detaileddescription.para: To abort the MQTT connection the function send a disconnect request to the broker by calling function mqtt_helper_disconnect provided by nRF IoT library.

briefdescription.para: The publish method of MQTT connector class.

detaileddescription.para:
payload
The payload of the topic
topic
The topic to be published
The function copy topic, payload and status information in a MQTT message of type struct mqtt_publish_param, which is provided by Zephyr MQTT Client library API. Afterwards it publish the topic by calling function mqtt_helper_publish provided by nRF IoT library. In case of an error a debug message at warning level will be printed. The MQTT helper functions are implemented on top of the Zephyr library API.

briefdescription.para: Getter function to retrieve the device ID (the modem's IMEI)

detaileddescription.para: The function read the device id (the modem's IMEI) in a buffer by calling function hw_id_get provided by nRF library API and store it in private member variable device_id.

briefdescription.para: Timer callback function for the reconnect timer.

detaileddescription.para:
timer
Pointer to timer of type k_timer
The function retrieve the user-specific data from the timer by calling kernel function k_timer_user_data_get and call MQTT connector timer expired function timer1_expired.

briefdescription.para: Callback handlers from MQTT helper library for connack from broker.

detaileddescription.para:
return_code
connection ackknowledge return value of enumeration type mqtt_conn_return_code
The function is called when MQTT connection ackknowledge packet has been received from the broker. In case of an connection error the return_code is unequal to 0 and the function returns immediately. In case connection is established the MQTT connector request a subscription of command topic by calling member function cmd_subscribe and of configuration topic by calling member function config_subscribe. Finally a message type to eMqttConnected will be send to its own (MQTT connector's) mailbox by call of function SendMsg provided by class Mbox.

briefdescription.para: Callback handlers from MQTT helper library for disconnect indication from broker.

detaileddescription.para: The function is called when MQTT disconnect indication packet has been received from the broker. It send a message of type eMqttDisconnected to its own (MQTT connector's) mailbox by call of function SendMsg provided by class Mbox.

briefdescription.para: Callback handlers from MQTT helper library for a subscribed topic from broker.

detaileddescription.para:
topic
The topic MQTT connector is subscribed
payload
The payload of the topic
The function is called when MQTT connection has received a subscribed topic from the broker. Topic and payload will be casted to strings and the command in payload string will be identified with string find method. In case command is OTA_START from topic /device/{device_id}/command and a firmware update is requested the function request a message from message pool, set message type to eOtaStart, set eMqttConnector as sender and send message to firmware update control task's mailbox. In case the string fw_version is found in the payload of topic /device/{device_id}/ota/update the function also request a message from message pool, set message type to eFwInfo, set eMqttConnector as sender and send message to firmware update control task's mailbox. In case command is RESET a reset will be performed by calling function performSwReset provided by class ResetCtrl. In case command is CFG_FACTORY_DEFAULT a message of type eFactoryDefault will be send to the MQTT Connector mailbox. In case command is COLDSTART a message of type eColdStartReq will be send to the MQTT Connector mailbox. In case command is BOOST_ON a message of type eBoostOnReq will be send to the MQTT Connector mailbox. In case command is BOOST_OFF a message of type eBoostOffReq will be send to the MQTT Connector mailbox. In case command is FS_ERASE a message of type eFsErase will be send to the MQTT Connector mailbox. In case command is FS_STAT a message of type eFsStatus will be send to the MQTT Connector mailbox. In case command is DISABLE_ADXL a message of type eDisableADXL will be send to the MQTT Connector mailbox. In case command is ENABLE_ADXL a message of type eEnableADXL will be send to the MQTT Connector mailbox. In case command is GET_CONFIG a message of type eGetConfig will be send to the MQTT Connector mailbox. In case command is SEND_PUBLIC_KEY a message of type eKeyTransferReq will be send to the MQTT Connector mailbox.

briefdescription.para: Callback handlers from MQTT helper library for suback from broker.

detaileddescription.para:
message_id
The message ID of the subscribe packet
result
The result code
The function is called when MQTT subscribe ackknowledge packet has been received from the broker. This message will be ignored, only a debug message at info level will be printed in case result signal success, a debug message at error level will be printed in case result signal failure and a debug message at warning level will be printed in case of unknown topic.

briefdescription.para: Callback handlers from MQTT helper library for puback from broker.

detaileddescription.para: The function is called when MQTT publish ackknowledge packet has been received from the broker. This message will be ignored, only a debug message at info level will be printed.

briefdescription.para: Function to send a subscribe request to the MQTT broker.

detaileddescription.para:
topic
Pointer to the topic (string) to be subscribed
The function copy topic and length in structure of type mqtt_topic, and put these in a structure of type mqtt_subscription_list together with the topic ID. Both structures are provided by Zephyr MQTT Client library API. Afterwards it send the subscribe request with the subscription list to the broker by calling function mqtt_helper_subscribe provided by nRF IoT library.

briefdescription.para: Function to send a subscribe request for the command topic to the MQTT broker.

detaileddescription.para: The function call private member function subscribe to subscribe to the command topic.

briefdescription.para: Function to send a subscribe request for the OTA topic to the MQTT broker.

detaileddescription.para: The function call private member function subscribe to subscribe to the over the air update (OTA) topic.

briefdescription.para: Function to send a subscribe request for the config topic to the MQTT broker.

detaileddescription.para: The function call private member function subscribe to subscribe to the configuration topic.

briefdescription.para: Function to publish data to the MQTT broker.

detaileddescription.para:
pTopic
Pointer to the topic to be send
pPayload
Pointer to the data to be send
The function copy the data in parameter pPayload to topic payload structure in variable msg, initialize the topic t with the topic of parameter pTopic and publish the topic by call of member function publish.

briefdescription.para: Function to publish a response to the MQTT broker.

detaileddescription.para:
pTopic
Pointer to the topic to be send
pPayload
Pointer to the data to be send
pRespType
Pointer to the response string "/accepted" or "/rejected"
The function copy the data in parameter pPayload to topic payload structure in variable msg, initialize the string target with the topic of parameter pTopic, append the response string "/accepted" or "/rejected" and copy the final string target in topic structure t. Finally it publish the topic by call of member function publish.

briefdescription.para: Function to publish a accepted response to the MQTT broker.

detaileddescription.para:
pTopic
Pointer to the topic to be send
pPayload
Pointer to the data to be send
By call of private member function PublishResponse the function publishs a accepted response to the MQTT broker.

briefdescription.para: Function to publish a accepted response to the MQTT broker.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
pTopic
Pointer to the topic to be send
By call of private member function PublishAcceptedResponse the function publishs a accepted response to the MQTT broker with the data of the received message pElem in the payload.

briefdescription.para: Function to publish a rejected response to the MQTT broker.

detaileddescription.para:
pTopic
Pointer to the topic to be send
pPayload
Pointer to the data to be send
By call of private member function PublishResponse the function publishs a rejected response to the MQTT broker.

briefdescription.para: Function to publish a rejected response to the MQTT broker.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
pTopic
Pointer to the topic to be send
By call of private member function PublishRejectedResponse the function publishs a rejected response to the MQTT broker with the data of the received message pElem in the payload.

briefdescription.para: Function to publish a download finished indication to the MQTT broker.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
pTopic
Pointer to the topic to be send
By call of private member function PublishData the function publishs a download finished indication to the MQTT broker with the data of the received message pElem in the payload.

briefdescription.para: Handler function for new incoming JSON configuration.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
The function copy the message payload of pElem to topic payload structure, initialize the topic with the config topic and extract the JSON configuration string in variable rx. Afterwards the function checks if the configuration is valid by calling method isValid provided by the Config class. If configuration is valid, the topic will be enhanced with string "/accepted" and published by call of the member function publish. Afterwards configuration will be stored in file system by calling function saveToFile also provided by Config class, before a reset is performed by calling calling function performSwReset provided by class ResetCtrl. If configuration is invalid, the topic will be enhanced with string "/rejected" and published by call of the member function publish.

briefdescription.para: Handler function for handling of a factory default request.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
By call of private member function PublishAcceptedResponse the function publishs a accepted response for the commad topic to the MQTT broker with the data of the received message pElem in the payload. Afterwards it deletes all files from flash file system by calling the functions deleteConfigFile and deleteKeyFiles. Finally performs a reset by calling function performSwReset provided by class ResetCtrl.

briefdescription.para: Handler function for handling of cold start request.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
By call of private member function PublishAcceptedResponse the function publishs a accepted response for the commad topic to the MQTT broker with the data of the received message pElem in the payload. Afterwards it send a message of type eColdStartReq to the reset control task by calling function sendMsg provided by class Mbox.

briefdescription.para: Handler function for handling of boost converter on request.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
By call of private member function PublishAcceptedResponse the function publishs a accepted response for the commad topic to the MQTT broker with the data of the received message pElem in the payload. Afterwards it send a message of type eBoostOnReq to the boost converter task by calling function sendMsg provided by class Mbox.

briefdescription.para: Handler function for handling of boost converter off request.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
By call of private member function PublishAcceptedResponse the function publishs a accepted response for the commad topic to the MQTT broker with the data of the received message pElem in the payload. Afterwards it send a message of type eBoostOffReq to the boost converter task by calling function sendMsg provided by class Mbox.

briefdescription.para: Handler function for handling of file system erase request.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
By call of private member function PublishAcceptedResponse the function publishs a accepted response for the commad topic to the MQTT broker with the data of the received message pElem in the payload. Afterwards it unmount the files system and delete the complete content by calling the functions unmount and eraseFs provided by class FlashFS. Finally it performs a reset by calling function performSwReset provided by class ResetCtrl.

briefdescription.para: Handler function for handling of file system status request.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
By call of private member function PublishAcceptedResponse the function publishs a accepted response for the commad topic to the MQTT broker with the file system status data in JSON format in the payload. File system status data will be retrieved by call of function getConfigJson provided by class FlashFS.

briefdescription.para: Handler function for handling disable ADXL request.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
By call of private member function PublishAcceptedResponse the function publishs a accepted response for the commad topic to the MQTT broker with the data of the received message pElem in the payload. Afterwards it send a message of type eDisableADXL to the ADXL37x task by calling function sendMsg provided by class Mbox.

briefdescription.para: Handler function for handling enable ADXL request.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
By call of private member function PublishAcceptedResponse the function publishs a accepted response for the commad topic to the MQTT broker with the data of the received message pElem in the payload. Afterwards it send a message of type eEnableADXL to the ADXL37x task by calling function sendMsg provided by class Mbox.

briefdescription.para: Handler function for handling get configuration request.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message
By call of private member function PublishAcceptedResponse the function publishs a accepted response for the commad topic to the MQTT broker with the configuration data in JSON format in the payload. Configuration data will be retrieved by call of function getConfigJson provided by class Config.

briefdescription.para: MQTT connector class derived from task base class.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para:
MQTT connector task handle the connection to the MQTT broker. It receives messages from the broker via static callback member functions, which needs to be registered in MQTT helper layer provided by the nRF IoT library. See details of nRF library See details of MQTT Client library API The MqttConnector class provides five handler functions to receive MQTT broker events, methods to request connection, disconnection and subsciption, to abort connection to broker and to publish topics to the broker. Furthermore it provides a method to read the hardware device ID (modem's IMEI). Message Interaction:
Receive
External PDN and LTE Link events
Timer interrupt callback
MQTT connector task (self)
Firmware update task
Firmware update control task
LTE connector task
Data manager task
Transmit
MQTT connector task (self)
Firmware update control task
MQTT connector task
